=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

    Type 'EnvB' is not assignable to type 'EnvA'.
      Types of property '_tag' are incompatible.
        Type '"EnvB"' is not assignable to type '"EnvA"'.
  (no quick fixes)

  Fix 0: "Disable missingEffectContext for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable missingEffectContext for entire file"

  Type 'EnvA | EnvB' is not assignable to type 'never'.
    Type 'EnvA' is not assignable to type 'never'.
  (no quick fixes)

  Fix 0: "Disable missingEffectContext for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable missingEffectContext for entire file"
